prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 115 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 113–115 区间，属中游偏上水平；该校在声誉文件中未见明显负面或正面事件，舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第 59（较热），综合热度约 54 万，短视频曝光处于中等偏上水平，反映一定报考关注度但未达高热；该校以林业工程、林学为特色，相关学科在业内具有较 强影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业涵盖计算机类、电子信息类、电气类等热门工科方向，这些专业大类在 2024–2026 年社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 20 万，按近年物理类占比约 71.8% 估算约 14.36 万人，与 2025 年物理类 14.34 万人基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在 30000–30300 区间企稳、2026 年计划小幅扩招约 0.7%、本省物理类考生数基本持平、学校声誉平稳、热门工科专业持续受追捧等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 30118 名基础上略有后移；预测最低位次约 30289 名，区间 29789–30789 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 24068→24807→32549→30337→30118. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (32549), while in 2024–2025 it fell back to the 30000–30300 range and stabilized; the 2025 baseline is about 30118, with a fluctuation range of about 2200 in the past two years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 283 in 2021–2022, 287 in 2023, 284 in 2024, and increased to 298 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 300, a slight expansion of about 0.7% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University main ranking is about 115th (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 113–115 range, at an upper-middle level; the university has no obvious negative or positive events in reputation documents, with stable public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 59th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 540,000, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting a certain degree of application attention but not extremely high; the university is characterized by forestry engineering and forestry, with related disciplines having strong influence in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors include popular engineering directions such as Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, and Electrical Class, which have been consistently hot/very hot recommended in 2024–2026; the total number of Gaokao candidates in the province in 2026 is about 200,000, estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 71.8%, basically flat with the 2025 Physics Category of 143,400.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in the 30000–30300 range, a slight expansion of about 0.7% in the 2026 plan, basically flat number of Physics Category candidates in the province, stable university reputation, and continued popularity of hot engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 30118; the predicted minimum ranking is about 30289, with a range of 29789–30789.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<29789), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors.
